commands.review_summary:
The PR adds warning handlers and delayed cleanup recovery for selected subagent lifecycle `completeSubagentRun` rejection paths, widens orphan-reconciliation source typing, and adds timeout grace regression coverage.

PR surface: Source +80, Tests +51. Total +131 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source for the unhandled-rejection class: current main has fire-and-forget `completeSubagentRun` calls and an uncaught async lifecycle listener. I did not establish a live current-main crash or fault-injection reproduction in this read-only review.
